nasb.text: They cried to the sons of Dan, who turned around and said to Micah, “What is the matter with you, that you have assembled together?”

esv.text: And they shouted to the people of Dan, who turned around and said to Micah, “What is the matter with you, that you come with such a company?”

cnv.text: 他們呼叫但人；但人轉過臉來，問米迦：“你召集了這麼多人出來作甚麼？”

ccb.text: 向他们大喊。但支派的人转身问米迦：“你们召集这么多人来做什么？”
